global.description: The ad features a vibrant pink background with a focus on a product display and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time offer for a product at a low price.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: LuxShelf logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the word 'LuxShelf' in bold, modern typography, set against a pink background.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A minimalist representation of two shelves, outlined in a simple design, suggesting a product display.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A simple circular icon, possibly representing a button or feature, placed in the center of the design.

elements.label: Bottom element
elements.description: A small rectangular area at the bottom of the ad, with no specific identifiable features.

elements.label: Limited stock message
elements.description: Text stating 'Limited stock Only this weekend' in a bold, eye-catching font, prominently displayed.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A rounded button with the text '€9.99 Try for free', designed to attract attention with a contrasting color.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The word 'LuxShelf' prominently displayed at the top of the ad in a large, bold font.
